ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or faculty */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department under which the school operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was established */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean responsible for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the department belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was established */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chair responsible for the department */,
  "number_of_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of faculty members in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the faculty member belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Field of specialization */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the faculty member is currently active */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "research_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the research area */,
  "is_interdisciplinary" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the research area is interdisciplinary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_areas_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_research_areas" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id", "research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member leading the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for the project's website or repository */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the project, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the publication is related to */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who is the author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department administrator, faculty member, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_faculty" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_project_research_areas" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_research_areas" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "research_area_id")
)
